---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, attack category, or training improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Category

- [ ] New prompt-injection attack category
- [ ] Training data improvement
- [ ] New CTF stage or mechanic
- [ ] Script or tooling improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Description

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve for learners or red teamers?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how to implement this, describe them here.

## Taxonomy Alignment

If this relates to a specific attack category, which one(s)?

| # | Category |
|---|----------|
| 1 | Authority Claims |
| 2 | Urgency Framing |
| 3 | Formal Formatting |
| 4 | Safety Framing |
| 5 | Roleplay Injection |
| 6 | Compliance Pressure |
| 7 | Incident Response |
| 8 | Redaction Requests |
| 9 | Debug Mode |
| 10 | Summarization Attacks |
| 11 | Ignore-Previous |
| 12 | Tool Trust |

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references.
